title: lycopersicon peruvianum subsp. puberulum
intro: Lycopersicon peruvianum subsp. puberulum, also known as the Peruvian wild tomato, is a wild species of tomato native to the Andean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its high concentration of antioxidants, anti-inflammatory compounds, and flavonoids, which have been shown to have potential anti-cancer and cardiovascular benefits. The health benefits of Lycopersicon peruvianum subsp. puberulum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
